description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a light-colored exterior, featuring a mix of flat and slightly pitched roof sections. The front facade includes a prominent arched entryway with a decorative window above the main door, flanked by large windows and a small porch area. A driveway leads to an attached garage, with a red car parked outside and several mature trees providing shade and landscaping around the property. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious patio with outdoor seating, and the windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, including a bay window. The house appears to have multiple rooms, including living spaces, bedrooms, and utility areas, visible through the open roof design. The overall style blends traditional and modern suburban elements, with clean lines and practical layout.
description: A single-story suburban house with a light exterior, attached garage, arched entryway, and landscaped yard with trees and patio. Features include large windows, a bay window, and a mix of flat and pitched roof sections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched entryway, attached garage with red car, and main landscaping with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and a clearer look at the house's depth and room arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spacious patio, bay window, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more trees, showing the house's length and window placement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay window and large front windows
attribute_entryway_design: Arched main entry with decorative window, small porch, and steps leading to the front door
